releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's changed
- Added release notes generation to the GitHub release workflow.
- Added GitHub artifact attestations for release assets.
- Removed the `!important` override from the plugin view padding rule and replaced it with a stricter selector.

## Verification
- `npm run release:check -- "0.5.1"`
- `npm run check:svelte`
- `npm run check`
- `npm run build`
- `npm test`

releases.author: kenanlian
releases.description: - Add automatic Chinese/English UI localization based on Obsidian language\n- Localize settings, commands, notices, modals, and card workspace views\n- Add coverage for locale switching and localized non-Markdown placeholders

releases.author: kenanlian
releases.description:
Pre-release readiness update for Card Workspace 0.1.7.

Highlights:
- Unblocks Svelte typecheck for the card panel.
- Adds MIT license metadata.
- Hardens unload/view lifecycle cleanup behavior.
- Adds deterministic large-vault first-indexing evidence.

Validation:
- npm run check
- npm run check:svelte
- npm run build
- npm test
- npm run release:check -- 0.1.7

releases.author: kenanlian
releases.description:
## Card Workspace v0.1.2

This release ships the indexed-only search architecture and release/documentation updates for the Obsidian Card Workspace plugin.

### Highlights
- Replaces the fallback/no-index search path with the indexed-only search pipeline.
- Improves scoped search empty-state behavior and copy.
- Updates release/version metadata across package.json, manifest.json, versions.json, and package-lock.json.
- Updates README and project documentation for release commands, validation, indexed-only search architecture, and v0.1.2 release status.
- Includes Sisyphus/Atlas plan, evidence, and decision documentation for the indexed-search-only work.
- Fixes the release-check issue where FolderCardPanel.svelte was missing EMPTY_PANEL_STATE.emptyStateMessage.

### Validation
- npm run release:check -- 0.1.2 passed.
- npm run check:svelte passed with 0 errors; known Toolbar.svelte a11y warnings remain.
- npm run check passed.
- npm run build passed; known Toolbar.svelte a11y warnings remain.
- npm test passed: 22 files / 402 tests.

### Assets
Install/update manually by downloading:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css
releases.name: Card Workspace v0.1.2
